reasoning: Elo ratings for elite chess players are extremely stable. Fabiano Caruana's rating on 2025-10-26 will be 2789 (the October 2025 official FIDE list, as confirmed by Wikipedia). To be at least 1% higher, his rating must rise by 28 points to 2817. Elite players have a K-factor of 10, meaning a 28-point gain requires scoring almost 3 full points above the expected score (an incredible tournament performance like +6 over expected against top opposition). Achieving this within 1 month (by November) or 3 months (by January) is phenomenally rare. Furthermore, the FIDE list is only updated monthly, meaning the November 2nd and November 25th dates will most likely draw on the exact same rating list. The probability of him gaining ~28 points in this very short timeframe is at the absolute lower bound.
